sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.57 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: An upper composition factor\/ of a group$G$is a composition factor of some finite quotient of$G$. Is there any restriction on the set of non-abelian upper composition factors of a finitely generated group? { \,A.\,Mann, \,D.\,Segal} There are no restrictions: any set of non-abelian finite simple groups can be the set of upper composition factors of a 63-generator group; if we allow the group to ha...
